title: T-039 — Canary upgrade orchestration Server Action (advanceCohort + recordMigrationRun)
prompt:
# T-039 — Canary upgrade orchestration Server Action (advanceCohort + recordMigrationRun)

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §8 (Upgrade orchestration)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Server Actions that drive canary-first upgrade rollouts: recordMigrationRun(component, tenantId, target, status, failure?) writes to tenant_migrations + emits an audit/outbox event, and advanceCohort(component, fromCohort, toCohort) promotes tenants from canary → early → general after the §8 monitor window (15-30 min).

## Implementation contract
(1) Add apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/recordMigrationRun.ts that upserts a tenant_migrations row, sets last_run_at=now(), and emits an outbox event `tenant.migration.run` (retention_class='operational') via the helper from T-008. (2) Add apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/advanceCohort.ts that selects all tenants where cohort=fromCohort AND status='succeeded' AND last_run_at < now() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' and bulk-updates them to cohort=toCohort in a single transaction; emits one `tenant.cohort.advanced` event per tenant. (3) Both actions guarded by the system-role 'org.platform.admin' (RBAC from T-014). (4) Vitest covers happy path + failure rollback + the 15-min monitor-window cutoff.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/recordMigrationRun.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/advanceCohort.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/__tests__/upgrade.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a tenant on cohort='canary' with status='idle', when recordMigrationRun(component='rule-engine', tenantId, target='v2', status='succeeded') runs, then the tenant_migrations row is updated to current_version='v2', status='succeeded', last_run_at=now() and an outbox event tenant.migration.run is emitted with retention_class='operational'
2. Given recordMigrationRun is called with status='failed' + failure_reason='migration X timeout', when it returns, then current_version is NOT bumped, status='failed' is persisted, and an outbox event with action='tenant.migration.run.failed' carries the failure_reason
3. Given 12 tenants on cohort='canary' with status='succeeded' and last_run_at older than 16 minutes, when advanceCohort(component='rule-engine', fromCohort='canary', toCohort='early') runs, then all 12 rows flip cohort='early' in one transaction and 12 outbox tenant.cohort.advanced events are emitted
4. Given the caller is not in role org.platform.admin, when either action is invoked, then it returns 403 and writes audit_events with retention_class='security'

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/app/api/internal/upgrade/_actions/__tests__/upgrade.test.ts covering all four ACs before the action files exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:integration'

## Risk red lines
- Do not advance any tenant whose status != 'succeeded' — partial-success rollouts violate §8 canary discipline
- Do not collapse the 15-minute monitor window — it is the §8 rollback safety net
- Do not write to tenant_migrations outside these actions; direct SQL writes break audit invariants

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-008
- T-009
- T-014
- T-038

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions recordMigrationRun + advanceCohort implementing §8 canary → early → general progression with 15-min monitor window.

No admin UI for orchestration (deferred — Phase D platform-admin console)
